title: Bridge Essay: Meditation and interoception: a conceptual framework for the narrative and exper

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Meditation and interoception: a conceptual framework for the narrative and experiential self.** — Frontiers in psychology (2024). DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2024.1393969. PMID: 39478794. The concept of the self is complex and there is no consensus on what the self is. However, there are emerging patterns in the literature that point to two different selves, the narrative and experiential self. The narrative self refers to a conceptual or representational knowledge of the self that extends across time and manifests in self-reflection and personality assessments. The experiential self refers to first-person perception, moment-to-moment awareness, embodiment, and a sense of agency.

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 7 (Emptiness). Evaluation: Good (score=2.5)
